ingested_turns.speaker: Caroline
ingested_turns.text: Hey Mel! Good to see you! How have you been?

ingested_turns.speaker: Melanie
ingested_turns.text: Hey Caroline! Good to see you! I'm swamped with the kids & work. What's up with you? Anything new?

ingested_turns.speaker: Caroline
ingested_turns.text: I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.

ingested_turns.speaker: Melanie
ingested_turns.text: Wow, that's cool, Caroline! What happened that was so awesome? Did you hear any inspiring stories?

ingested_turns.speaker: Caroline
ingested_turns.text: [Image: a photo of a dog walking past a wall with a painting of a woman] The transgender stories were so inspiring! I was so happy and thankful for all the support.

ingested_turns.speaker: Melanie
ingested_turns.text: Wow, love that painting! So cool you found such a helpful group. What's it done for you?

ingested_turns.speaker: Caroline
ingested_turns.text: The support group has made me feel accepted and given me courage to embrace myself.

ingested_turns.speaker: Melanie
ingested_turns.text: That's really cool. You've got guts. What now?

ingested_turns.speaker: Caroline
ingested_turns.text: Gonna continue my edu and check out career options, which is pretty exciting!

ingested_turns.speaker: Melanie
ingested_turns.text: Wow, Caroline! What kinda jobs are you thinkin' of? Anything that stands out?
